testCaseName: Details action with order by, limit and offset
query: default.filter((country = 'Switzerland') && (pango_lineage.lineage('B.1.1.7', includeSublineages:=true))).orderBy({primary_key}).offset(9).limit(2).project({age, country, date, division, primary_key, pango_lineage, qc_value, region, test_boolean_column, unsorted_date, usherTree})
